rationale: Art. VIII, §11 governs place of assessment and valuation of unrendered property. It does not address homestead exemption amounts; that authority arises under art. VIII, §1-b. No conflict.
quote: All property, whether owned by persons or corporations shall be assessed for taxation, and the taxes paid in the county where situated
_note: The cited constitutional provision is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts; the relevant constitutional authority for homestead exemptions is Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b.
